commit.message:
Increase chat timeout to 60s to prevent frozen state

Tool calls can chain multiple AI rounds (search → synthesize → respond),
easily exceeding the default 30s axios timeout. When it timed out, the
retry interceptor would retry the POST, potentially duplicating messages
while the UI stayed stuck in loading state.

commit.message:
Fix IS phase 2 circulaire + TMI plafonnement QF

1. IS phase 2 : calculer l'IS sur le résultat total (missions + placements)
   en une seule fois, puis répartir au prorata. Avant, chaque composante
   calculait l'IS avec un seuil résiduel dépendant de l'autre → circularité
   qui surpayait l'IS de quelques centaines d'€/an.

2. TMI après plafonnement QF : retourner la TMI du QF à 2 parts (celle
   qui s'applique réellement) au lieu de celle du QF avec demi-parts
   (trop basse quand le plafonnement mord).

Analyse des autres points signalés :
- PER double comptage : pas un bug (déduction fiscale + investissement
  sont deux flux distincts correctement modélisés)
- Pool drawdown off-by-one : pas un bug (annees-1 contributions dans
  computeCapitalProjection, cohérent avec la boucle)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: patch 3 bugs and 2 minor issues in Quicksilver v2.2

- Fix cross-realm instanceof Request by using duck-type check, so
  fetch(new Request(...)) works across Tampermonkey sandbox boundary
- Guard Cache API availability and reset cachePromise on failure,
  preventing permanent breakage on HTTP pages or quota errors
- Split NO_CACHE_DIRECTIVES: only no-store blocks caching; no-cache and
  must-revalidate now cache but always trigger background revalidation,
  fixing missed caching of common CDN headers like
  "public, max-age=31536000, must-revalidate"
- Remove unnecessary response.clone() in background revalidation path
- Extend font-display MutationObserver to also watch document.body

sourceStatus now includes jobicy and themuse counts.

Replace FTP-Deploy-Action with lftp mirror for reliable uploads

SamKirkland/FTP-Deploy-Action silently skipped node_modules directory
(only 27 of 150+ files detected). Use lftp mirror instead which
reliably uploads all files including deep directory structures.

Also fix npm ci --production deprecation warning (use --omit=dev).
Add diagnostic output to verify publish directory contents.

Fix KeyError: PF_NAME crash on Streamlit Cloud

The facility lookup file (utils/permit_facility_lookup.csv) was never
committed to the repo, so Streamlit Cloud couldn't backfill PF_NAME
from the lookup. Added the file and a guard in load_data() so PF_NAME
defaults to "Unknown Facility" if the column is still missing.

fix(pipeline): robust contract violation parsing for verbose agent output (#384)

Add disk-based result.toml fallback and embedded path extraction to
handle cases where employee tools produce verbose multi-line output
that prevents clean path extraction from stdout.

Two-pronged fix:
- session_result_fallback_is_valid() validates session-dir result.toml
  on disk when output parsing fails (symlink + nlink + TOML checks)
- extract_embedded_result_toml_path() scans output lines for absolute
  paths ending in result.toml even when surrounded by other text

fix: simplify pre-commit hook to auto-encrypt on every commit

The previous hook was overengineered with 3 conditional checks that still
required manual encrypt steps. New hook: on every commit, if SCORING_KEY
is in .env, check sync and auto-encrypt + stage .enc files. Zero manual steps.

Workflow is now: edit data.ts/scorer.ts → git commit → done.

Restructured project into app/src/server architecture. Added Quick Check mode
for in-progress defect detection on press and Final Inspection mode for
comparing production prints against QC-approved reference samples off the dryer.

and /api/compare endpoints, and universal iOS/iPadOS device support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: make pre-commit hook and CI catch .enc drift for gitignored scoring files

Root cause: scorer.ts and data.ts are gitignored, so neither the pre-commit
hook (checked staged files) nor encrypt-scoring.yml (triggered on path changes)
ever fired. The .enc files could only be updated manually.

Fixes:
- Pre-commit hook: if ANY challenge files are staged and SCORING_KEY is set,
  run scoring:status and auto-encrypt if out of sync
- encrypt-scoring.yml: trigger on .enc and index.ts changes instead of
  gitignored plaintext; verify sync after decrypt
- .env.example: document SCORING_KEY for local dev setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

Fix location never reaching Aria: swap GPS order, add timeouts

Location was NULL because getCurrentPositionAsync(Low) timed out silently
at launch, and getLastKnownPositionAsync returned null (no cached fix).
- Try cached position first (instant), then GPS with Balanced accuracy + 8s timeout
- Send-time fallback now does real GPS fetch with 5s timeout instead of only cached
- Also reverse geocodes at send-time so city/state are available

commit.message:
feat: CI checks for service image tag sync and scoring .enc drift

Two new CI checks prevent deployment bugs:

1. check-service-images.sh: Fails if .image file tag doesn't match
   the image tag in the challenge's index.ts ServiceSpec. Would have
   caught the training-lab:2.0 → 3.0 mismatch.

2. check-scoring-sync.sh: Fails if plaintext scoring files (data.ts,
   scorer.ts) are out of sync with their .enc counterparts. Would have
   caught the stale .enc files that overwrote budget system changes on
   deploy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
